g.text: body { font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, sans-serif; background: linear-gradient(135deg, #1a1a2e 0%, #16213e 50%, #0f3460 100%); min-height: 100vh; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; }
.container { background: rgba(255,255,255,0.05); backdrop-filter: blur(10px); border-radius: 16px; padding: 40px; width: 100%; max-width: 400px; border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1); }
h1 { color: #e0e0e0; text-align: center; margin-bottom: 8px; font-size: 24px; }
h2 { color: #a0a0a0; text-align: center; margin-bottom: 32px; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 400; }
label { display: block; color: #c0c0c0; margin-bottom: 6px; font-size: 13px; }

input { width: 100%; padding: 12px 16px; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.08); border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.15); border-radius: 8px; color: #e0e0e0; font-size: 15px; outline: none; transition: border-color 0.2s; }

button { width: 100%; padding: 12px; background: linear-gradient(135deg, #0f3460, #16213e); color: #e0e0e0; border: 1px solid rgba(79,195,247,0.3); border-radius: 8px; font-size: 15px; cursor: pointer; transition: all 0.2s; }
.error { color: #ef5350; text-align: center; margin-top: 12px; font-size: 13px; display: none; }
